Christmas at LSLC

Christmas At Living savior Lutheran church

Advent Service

  • Mid-Week Advent Services 7:00pm – December 1st, 8th, and 15th
  • Services of Lessons and Carols, Sunday, December 19th at 8:30am Service

Christmas Eve Candlelight Services

  • December 24th, 6:30pm and 8:30pm

Cathedral Brass Band Concert
December 4th, 6:00pm

Living Savior Lutheran Church
Come celebrate the Christmas season with our traditional Cathedral Brass Band Concert. Due to Covid-19 cautions there will not be a potluck this year.
https://www.cathedralbrass.org/

Christmas Trees for Sale
We are once again blessed to sell beautiful, live Christmas Trees up to 10ft in the parking lot of LSLC. Sales start on Friday, November 26th.
Saturdays - 10am to 5pm
Sundays - 1pm to 5pm
Weeknights - 6:30pm to 8:30pm

The LSLC Angel Tree has begun. We have only 4 more Angel tags left on the tree. If you are interested in getting a tag, please make your way to the LSLC narthex soon. Due to the constraints at Shelter House, there were only a limited number of gifts to be provided. All gifts need to be at LSLC no later than December 16th

In addition to the children’s gifts. We are planning on providing gift cards to the parent as well to help with Christmas. A Signup Genius will be coming out soon for donations or you con provide a check or cash in your church envelope or basket near the Angel Tree.

Thank you all for your generosity for those going through such difficult experiences.

Sunday early service
at 8:30am

Sunday late service
at 11:00am

Sunday School Times

K through 5th grade
at 10:00 until 10:45am

Confirmation, HS, and Adult
at 9:45 until 10:45am

For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life. (John 3:16)
